item.title: LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Knuckles’ Guardian Mech Action Figure Toy for Kids Boys & Girls with Video Game Character Figures Incl. Knuckles and Rouge the Bat Plus a Master Emerald Fun Gift Idea 76996
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog Knuckles’ Guardian Mech Action Figure Toy for Kids Boys & Girls with Video Game Character Figures Incl. Knuckles and Rouge the Bat Plus a Master Emerald Fun Gift Idea 76996 here: ℹ️: Creative toys – All of the LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog sets introduce kids to fast action fun and imaginative play with different story possibilities Knuckles toy – The posable mech Sonic figure with large punching fists inspires kids’ adventure play and is easy to take on gaming fans’ playdates Sonic toys – Treat kids aged 8+ with this Knuckles’ Guardian Mech playset packed with options to inspire stories with iconic video game characters Gifts for gamers – This buildable gift for boys and girls aged 8+ enhances kids storytelling play with functions including a platform on the glider to hold the Master Emerald Guardian mech – Features a buildable mech action figure with dual blasters, a glider and a Master Emerald, plus Knuckles and Rouge the Bat LEGO Sonic adventures – This fun set lets fans expand their play endlessly by adding it to other LEGO Sonic the Hedgehog toys (sold separately) 🛒 Buy it now!

item.title: LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337
item.description: You’ve got LEGO City Express Passenger Train Set Remote Controlled Toy Gifts for 7 Plus Year Old Kids Boys & Girls with Working Headlights 2 Coaches and 24 Track Pieces Plus 6 Minifigures 60337 at the following link: ℹ️: Includes 6 LEGO minifigures: 4 passengers, train driver, restaurant worker, plus bike and helmet, wheelchair, briefcase and backpack accessories This train toy for kids includes a train with a restaurant car, passenger coach, station platform, 24 track pieces and 6 minifigures LEGO City Express toy train set is an exciting birthday gift for kids, boys and girls age 7 plus and any fan of remote control trains and cars This LEGO city train set features a remote control bullet locomotive train toy with working, dimmable headlights and LEGO Powered Up technology The train and its dimmable lights can be controlled via the included remote control or a smart device equipped with the LEGO Powered Up App Kids can role-play cool scenarios: wait at the platform, board the restaurant car for a toy hotdog or hop on the passenger coach with laptop This LEGO train set comes with step-by-step instructions for each model, so kids can learn to build the remote control train with confidence 🛒 Check the deal!
